creator: warlock@phouka.net
text:
My ~2/24 amd64 current run (main-n268514-61b88a230ba) against rust-1.76.0 (since that hit ports) has progressed well past where it was stuck before but hasn't finished crunching yet.  Sounds like other people have already had success there.

The arm64/aarch64 system will get to that point eventually.
